name: Joan Rivers
description: American comedian, actress, and television host (1933–2014)
abstract: Joan Alexandra Molinsky (June 8, 1933 – September 4, 2014), known professionally as Joan Rivers, was an American comedian, actress, producer, writer and television host. She was noted for her blunt, often controversial comedic persona that was heavily self-deprecating and acerbic, especially towards celebrities and politicians, delivered…

about_quotes.speaker: Sheryl Bailey
about_quotes.evidence: on a different art form, stand-up comedy is Joan Rivers. I recommend this movie, “Joan Rivers: A Piece of Work.”
about_quotes.doc_title: Sheryl Bailey interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, July 24, 2023

about_quotes.speaker: Howie Shear
about_quotes.evidence: When I was doing the Joan Rivers Show, I was the musical arranger for the Joan Rivers late night show
about_quotes.doc_title: Howie Shear interviewed by Monk Rowe, Dunkirk, New York, October 11, 2014

about_quotes.speaker: Marian McPartland
about_quotes.evidence: The interviewer mentions Joan Rivers as a guest host on The Tonight Show; the interviewee does not mention Joan Rivers and only responds to the general question about taking a sabbatical.
about_quotes.doc_title: Marian McPartland — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Greg Caputo
about_quotes.evidence: All the acts came through, from Milton Berle to Joan Rivers... most of them I did [play with].
about_quotes.doc_title: Greg Caputo interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, March 14, 1998
